title: Nandikeshwari Temple
tagline: Nandikeshwari Temple — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Nandikeshwari temple, also known as Nandikeshwari Tala, is located in Sainthia City of West Bengal.
overview.description: Nandikeshwari temple, also known as Nandikeshwari Tala, is located in Sainthia City of West Bengal. The temple is part of the famous Shakta pithas in Indian Subcontinent.

topPlaces.name: Sainthia
topPlaces.description: Sainthia (formerly Nandipur) is a city and a municipality in Suri Sadar subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The city is known as business city of Birbhum district.

topPlaces.name: Gadadharpur
topPlaces.description: Gadadharpur is a village in the Sainthia subdivision of Birbhum district, West Bengal, India. It falls under the jurisdiction of Bajitpur Gram Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Lalbazar
topPlaces.description: Lalbazar is a neighbourhood in Central Kolkata, earlier known as Calcutta, in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is part of the central business district adjoining B.B.D. Bagh area.

topPlaces.name: Kotasur
topPlaces.description: Kotasur (also spelled as Katasur) is a census town in Mayureswar II CD Block in Rampurhat subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is situated in the bank of river Mayurakshi..

topPlaces.name: Angar Garia
topPlaces.description: Angar Garia (also spelled Angargoria) is a village and gram panchayat in Mohammad Bazar CD Block in Suri Sadar subdivision of Birbhum district.

topPlaces.name: Tentulberia
topPlaces.description: Tentulberia is a neighborhood of Rajpur Sonarpur, in the South 24 Parganas district, in West Bengal, India. It is accessible from the Garia Station Road, Rajpur Sonarpur.

items.note: Sainthia (formerly Nandipur) is a city and a municipality in Suri Sadar subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The city is known as business city of Birbhum district.
Gadadharpur is a village in the Sainthia subdivision of Birbhum district, West Bengal, India. It falls under the jurisdiction of Bajitpur Gram Panchayat.
Lalbazar is a neighbourhood in Central Kolkata, earlier known as Calcutta, in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is part of the central business district adjoining B.B.D. Bagh area.

Kotasur (also spelled as Katasur) is a census town in Mayureswar II CD Block in Rampurhat subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is situated in the bank of river Mayurakshi..
Angar Garia (also spelled Angargoria) is a village and gram panchayat in Mohammad Bazar CD Block in Suri Sadar subdivision of Birbhum district.
Tentulberia is a neighborhood of Rajpur Sonarpur, in the South 24 Parganas district, in West Bengal, India. It is accessible from the Garia Station Road, Rajpur Sonarpur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nandikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nandikeshwari Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nandikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (164 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (127 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nandikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nandikeshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nandikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nandikeshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nandikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sainthia, Gadadharpur, Lalbazar, Kotasur, Angar Garia.
